items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the compatibility with normal selector logic, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for compatibility with normal selector logic, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or validations related to it. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding this requirement.
